examples: Other associated neurological symptoms, such as numbness and weakness, are variably present.
The climate is temperate and Mediterranean with hot, dry summers and cool, variably rainy winters.
But Africa's rain falls more variably than, say, Norway's, and its DAMS often operate below capacity.
The 50th anniversary of the Council of Europe, as the club of some 40 (variably) democratic countries is called, meets in Budapest.
